title: Draper 83463 Fibreglass Mini Mattock and Pick, 400g
features: Strong yet lightweight, perfect for use where it’s not practical to use a full sized tool
Manufactured with a drop forged steel head, heat treated and tempered for durability and attached to a soft grip fibreglass handle
Ideal for gardening, root cutting, landscaping etc
description: From the manufacturer Draper About Us We’re an independent family business. It begins with our founder Bert Draper and his wife Emily. In 2019, We celebrate our centenary. Draper is our core range of quality tools which are suitable for enthusiasts and tradespeople alike. Draper 83709 400 mm 1 kg Fibreglass Mini Mattock and Pick Strong yet lightweight, perfect for use where it's not practical to use a full sized tool. Manufactured with a drop forged steel head, heat treated and tempered for durability and attached to a soft grip fibreglass handle. Ideal for gardening, root cutting, landscaping etc. All of the tools in the Draper gardening tool range are designed to be tough, durable. Ease of use and ergonomic design are key features in all Draper gardening tools, making them suitable for anybody who requires a quality tool, from the occasional gardener to the professional grounds man or landscape gardener. Draper Tools is a family-run company that has been selling high-quality tools in the United Kingdom for more than 90 years. To bring one the tool one need, the Draper buying team sources innovative products.
